creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
WWW url is giving error and MASTER_SITES don't permit download of src:

=> Attempting to fetch https://www.uni-due.de/~be0001/netperfmeter/download/netperfmeter-1.9.7.tar.xz
fetch: https://www.uni-due.de/~be0001/netperfmeter/download/netperfmeter-1.9.7.tar.xz: Gone

Could you check the problem?
Is there other site to get tarball?
